description: scaffold a complete LightningDataModule (prepare_data/setup + train/val/test/predict dataloaders) boilerplate
rules: read-only: produces a local .py scaffold, never downloads data or mutates remote state
scaffold source is written to record_store/${OUT_NAME}; validation stdout goes to scaffold_datamodule.log
emitting the template needs no heavy lib; the optional validation run needs lightning + torch installed
usage: Set OUT_NAME (the .py filename to write). Output: record_store/${OUT_NAME} + scaffold_datamodule.log.
limitation: Emits boilerplate only — the CustomDataset uses placeholder tensors; wire in real data loading yourself.
